A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: Buttons hum and lights glow bright, Coins go in and treats come out at night. Press a number, wait a beat—Find your snack where metal and hunger meet.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: From tiny chips to waves in the air, I connect people here and there. Without me, phones would just be stone, Find the place where signals are grown.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: KEVYHE (Hint: Shift letters back by 4 positions in the alphabet)

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I am a shelter of minds that race, Where wheels, wings, and stars find their place. From the spark of light to the roar of speed, I'm the ground where new ideas breed. What am I?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: Where voices travel without a sound, And signals bridge both sky and ground. Steps in tiers, like waves they flow, Find the place where networks grow.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: A canvas of colors watches from above, Patterns of art where shapes interweave. Not of stone alone, nor only of glass, A modern hall where many paths pass. Seek the doorway beneath its gaze, Where knowledge awaits in quiet maze.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: Though no teacher stands to speak, I'm a place where new life you can seek. Behind my fence of gilded hue, I hold the green, the fresh, the new. Where seedlings rise and lessons start, you will find the garden's heart.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: You'll know me by my colors, yellow and bright red, the exterior of a place where machines are fed. Inside, massive computers hum and learn, as lines of code and models take their turn. It's a hub for minds to build and to train, the future of technology that will one day reign.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I hide between two worlds of code, Where algorithms and apps are sowed. Palm trees guard my quiet ground, Yet few may know where I am found. Not a hall, but open sky, A secret garden where minds pass by.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: Where cells divide and science thrives, I'm a bustling spot for countless lives. My steps become a stage for crowds, where cheers and chants rise into the clouds. I am not the lab, but I am in sight. What am I?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I stand with pillars, shaded and tall, Guarding the memory that started it all. Steps lead up where silence stays, Honoring vision in timeless ways. Not a classroom, yet wisdom I hold—Find the heart where stories are told.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I sit outside the hall of books, a shady place with quiet nooks. I'm a campus crossroads for minds to meet, surrounded by buildings on every street.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I stand beneath the open sky, where branches wave as people walk by. My tables fill with plates of food, and stories shared in a lively mood. Step through my door and you will see, a bustling heart of hospitality.

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I have a natural facade of stone and of wood, but inside my walls, a different world has stood. Here, fingers fly across screens alight, as ideas and codes take their digital flight. A meeting place for a collaborative mind, what am I?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I house machines, though none are at rest, Where minds and engines are put to the test. With wheels and gears, the future I steer, Innovation and learning are nurtured here. A name of wisdom stands with a car's might, Can you tell me who I am, shining bright?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I am the place where wheels are many, Engines roar though the halls seem empty. Two names I hold, one of horse and one of sun, Together they build machines that run. Where are you?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I sit between minds that never rest, Where formulas, signals, and knowledge are blessed. A patch of green, where footsteps slow, Students gather, then off they go. Not a class, yet lessons stay, In whispered talks or a tired break's way. Between four halls of wisdom's might, What am I, a calm in sight?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: Through a leafy lane, a path I weave, where tired students, a sigh of relief, find rest in my shelter, a welcome space, a second home in this busy place. What am I?

A.title: Decode the Scene
A.description: I am not the bank, though I rest nearby, Ideas are my currency, algorithms I supply. Between the entrance and the civil domain, Students debug here again and again. Who am I?

B.title: Look Closely, Seek Wisely
B.description: Find the Location in the Image and click Verify Location!

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Not a lab of chemicals, nor a studio of art, Here axioms wed arguments and theorems take part. If you follow proofs instead of paint or flame, You'll find the place that answers every name.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Wide steps stretch like open arms, Two red towers guard with charm. In this courtyard, grand and high, Your next clue waits—go, don't shy!

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: In Shade, Everyone Takes Rest; Evenings Echo.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Under a roof of metal shade, Red tiles mark the path once laid. With garlands above and lamps that glow, Seek the shrine where blessings flow.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Careful Engineers Navigate, Testing Every Route Of Future Rides. Cars Often Network, Navigating Every Commute, Taking Extra Data. Autonomy Uses Tomorrows' Observations, Navigating Optimal Machine Outcomes, Updating Systems. Vehicles Evaluate Highway, Intelligence, Control, Learning, Efficiently, Safely. Hint: Pluck the alphabet's eldest from each word (the letters that lead them). Chain those elders in order, then partition into sensible words.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Where boots mark earth and nets breathe slow, Where shouts and whistles come and go. Find the field where games begin—Your next clue waits where goals stand in.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Where paper promises change their hands, Counters hum and value stands. Look for red above the door—your wise clue waits there.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: I'm a bird of iron, frozen mid-flight, A story of journeys locked in plain sight. I never take off, though my nose points high, Forever I'm waiting to conquer the sky. What am I?

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Not a temple, yet I wear its crown, With steps of stone that trickle down. Tiny spires upon me stay, Silent watchers, night and day.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: When the bell rings, I turn into a hive. Hungry bees line up, buzzing for bread, puffs, and chai. Though tiny, I sweeten the longest days. Who am I?

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: I stand between books and beakers, a place where knowledge meets matter. I'm a grassy triangle, a silent meeting point for scholars on their way to decode the world's secrets.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: RI CPF TGUGCTEJ DNQEM - OG FGRCTVOGPV (Hint: Caesar cipher - shift each letter 2 positions forward in the alphabet)

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Not a workshop, not a lab of flame, Here problems wear a binary name. Seek the halls where bugs are tamed—The home of code is where you aim.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: 27872 76268427 (Hint: Map letters using a classic phone keypad - 2=ABC, 3=DEF, 4=GHI, 5=JKL, 6=MNO, 7=PQRS, 8=TUV, 9=WXYZ)

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Levels, plumbs and steady beams, Calculations shape their dreams. Look for the place that builds and plans—Your clue waits with steady hands.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: I'm three of a kind, each one the same. I spark your path with light and flame. Find the hall where circuits meet—Three letters repeat.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: I mix and I change, never staying the same, From liquid to solid, from spark into flame. Find the place where elements meet, Equations of balance make learning complete.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: Without me, phones would fall silent, Radios and satellites defiant. I'm the bridge that lets signals flow, Where you must now choose to go.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: I'm the place you seek when you're not at your best, Where pain finds answers, and worries find rest. No classroom, no lab, but care is my art, Step through my doors for a healing start.

B.title: Decode the Scene
B.description: ZFWRGLIRFN (Hint: Replace each letter with its opposite in the alphabet A→Z, B→Y, C→X...)
